reference.domains: (topic reference) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c reference oceReference-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
reference.title: Copyright and Trademarks

section.title: Copyright
section.p: No part of this publication may be copied, modified, reproduced or transmitted in any form or by any means, electronic, manual or otherwise, without the prior written permission of Canon Production Printing. Illustrations and printer output images are simulated and do not necessarily apply to products and services offered in each local market. The content of this publication should neither be construed as any guarantee or warranty with regard to specific properties or specifications nor of technical performance or suitability for particular applications. The content of this publication may be subject to changes from time to time without notice.
CANON PRODUCTION PRINTING SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES OF ANY NATURE, OR LOSSES OR EXPENSES RESULTING FROM THE USE OF THE CONTENTS OF THIS PUBLICATION.
Image Logic, Power Logic, PowerM, Print Exec, Print Logic, PRISMA, On Remote Logic, are registered trademarks of Canon Production Printing.

Adobe, Acrobat, Adobe Premiere, After Effects, FrameMaker, PageMaker, Photoshop, PostScript, and the Adobe logos are either registered trademarks or trademarks of Adobe Systems Incorporated in the United States and/or other countries.

Access, ActiveX, Azure, Excel, Internet Explorer, Jscript, Microsoft, Microsoft Corporate Logo, Microsoft Edge, Office 365, OneNote, Outlook, PowerPoint, SharePoint, Silverlight, Skype, SQL, Server, Visio, Windows, Windows 365, Windows Azure, Windows Mobile, Windows Phone, Windows Server, Windows Vista, Word are trademarks or registered trademarks of Microsoft Corp. incorporated in the United States and/or other countries.
McAfee, SiteAdvisor, and the McAfee logos are trademarks or registered trademarks of McAfee, Inc. in the United States and other countries.

Color Cue®2, COLORSTROLOGY™, ColorSuite®, COLORTEAMSM, ColorVANTAGE®, ColorWeb®, Hexachrome®, Huey™, PANTONE®, PANTONE Chip Logo, PANTONE Color Cue®2, Pantone Color Institute®, PANTONE ColorVANTAGE®, PANTONE Fan Chip Logo, PANTONE Goe™, PANTONE Hexachrome Logo, PANTONE Hexachrome®, PANTONE MATCHING SYSTEM®, PANTONE ASSISTANT™, PANTONE Plastics Color System™, PANTONE Process Color System®, PANTONE Textile Color System®, PANTONE The Color of Ideas(sm), PANTONE The Global Language of Color™, PANTONE The Power of Color®, PANTONE UNIVERSE™, PORTABLE COLOR MEMORY®, The Power of Color™, COLOR NEWS®, ColorUp®, ColorWise®, PANTONE Consumer Color Preference Study®, PANTONE Wherever There's Color®, Wherever There's Color, There's PANTONE®, and other Pantone trademarks and service marks are the property of Pantone.
All other trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
